chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.348 of 2022 Pakistan Electronic Media Regulatory Authority (PEMRA) and another Versus M/s Labbaik (Private) Limited and others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing (priority) case 1. For order on office objection reply at “A”. 2. For hearing of main case. 3. For hearing of CMA No.3456/2022 (Stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 19.03.2024 Mr. Kashif Hanif, Advocate for Appellants. Mr. Hassan Qamar, Advocate for Respondent No.1..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. This appeal is filed against an ad-interim order dated 16.09.2022, whereas, the application is yet to be decided in the suit. Mr. Kashif Hanif, learned counsel for appellants submits that he would be satisfied if some directions are given to the learned single Judge to decide pending application preferably in sixty days’ time. Accordingly, this appeal is disposed off along with pending application(s) with the direction that the pending application in suit be heard and decided preferably in sixty days’ time. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
